allow: PowerShell($dirs = Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\skills" -Directory; $withManifest = \($dirs | Where-Object { Test-Path \(Join-Path $_.FullName 'SKILL.md'\) }\).Count; Write-Output "Folders: $\($dirs.Count\), with SKILL.md: $withManifest")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\gorho\\SPM Interactive\\.NET Projects\\VerBuddy\\Frontend\\src" -Recurse -File | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.Replace\('c:\\Users\\gorho\\SPM Interactive\\.NET Projects\\VerBuddy\\Frontend\\src\\',''\) })

Bash(sqlcmd -S "\(localdb\)\\MSSQLLocalDB" -Q "ALTER DATABASE [EnglishLearningApp] SET SINGLE_USER WITH ROLLBACK IMMEDIATE; ALTER DATABASE [EnglishLearningApp] MODIFY NAME = [VerBuddy]; ALTER DATABASE [VerBuddy] SET MULTI_USER; ALTER DATABASE [EnglishLearningApp_Tests] SET SINGLE_USER WITH ROLLBACK IMMEDIATE; ALTER DATABASE [EnglishLearningApp_Tests] MODIFY NAME = [VerBuddy_Tests]; ALTER DATABASE [VerBuddy_Tests] SET MULTI_USER;")
